hero.headline: Affordable Group Health Plans for Texas Businesses.
hero.subheadline: New Horizons Benefits Group helps employers find the right coverage for their teams — with access to one of the largest PPO networks in the country.

statsBar.label3: Cost for Your Group Plan Review

costCallout.heading1: Is Your Group Plan Costing More
costCallout.body: Many Texas businesses are overpaying for group coverage. Your company could be saving thousands every year.

coverageOptions.heading: Coverage Built Around Your Business
coverageOptions.description: We don’t believe in one-size-fits-all. Every plan we recommend is built around your team, your industry, and your budget.
coverageOptions.card1Body: Tailored health plans for small businesses. We help you navigate carrier options and find the best fit for your team and budget.
coverageOptions.card2Body: A hybrid approach that combines the savings potential of self-funding with the predictability of a fully-insured plan. Ideal for healthy groups.
coverageOptions.card3Body: Traditional group coverage with fixed monthly premiums. Predictable costs and comprehensive benefits your employees can count on.
coverageOptions.card4Body: HRAs and ICHRAs let you reimburse employees for individual coverage — a flexible, tax-advantaged alternative to traditional group plans.
coverageOptions.card5Body: Dental, vision, life, disability, accident, and critical illness coverage. Enhance your benefits package without increasing your core plan costs.
coverageOptions.card6Body: Guidance for businesses with employees approaching 65. We help coordinate group coverage with Medicare to avoid gaps and reduce costs.
coverageOptions.card7Body: Indemnity plans give your employees the freedom to visit any provider without referrals or network restrictions. A flexible option for businesses that value choice.

familyComparison.heading: One Plan vs. The Split Strategy
familyComparison.description: For a family of four, keeping everyone on one employer plan can cost significantly more than splitting coverage strategically.
familyComparison.explainer: Thanks to the Family Glitch fix, if your employer’s family coverage exceeds 9.96% of your household income, your spouse and dependents may qualify for subsidized Marketplace plans — even if your own employee coverage is considered affordable.

quoteForm.heading: Contact Us for a Free Quote
quoteForm.description: Fill out the form below and Robert will reach out within 1 business day with a personalized quote for your business.
quoteForm.sectionPOCDescription: Add a secondary contact if someone else should receive the quote.
quoteForm.labelHasInsurance: Do you currently have group insurance?
quoteForm.noInsuranceMessage: No problem — we’ll help you find the right plan!
quoteForm.finePrint: Free quote. No obligation. No spam.
quoteForm.successMessage: Robert will reach out within 1 business day with your personalized quote.

network.stat2Label: PHCS Multi-Plan is one of the oldest & largest PPO networks in the US
network.stat3Label: Check if your current doctor is already covered — most are
network.heading: Access to One of the Largest PPO Networks in the Country
network.body1: The Multi-Plan PHCS Network gives New Horizons clients access to a massive nationwide PPO network — meaning your doctors, specialists, and hospitals are likely already in-network.
network.body2: In-network repricing means you benefit from pre-negotiated rates — in one documented case, a 57% discount was applied to services rendered.
network.link: Check if your doctor is in-network →

features.heading: More Than Just Insurance
features.description: Every New Horizons plan comes loaded with features most insurance companies charge extra for — or don’t offer at all.
features.card1Body: Skip the waiting room. Consult with a licensed physician anytime, anywhere, right from your phone. Available 24/7 for non-emergency care.
features.card2Body: A personal concierge will find in-network providers near you and even schedule your appointments. No more hunting for who accepts your plan.
features.card3Body: For any non-emergency surgery, we shop both in-network and out-of-network surgery centers for the best price. Just provide your CPT codes — we handle the rest.
features.card4Body: Karis 360 negotiates directly with providers on bills over $2,500. They have a 70% success rate in lowering bills — and a 25% success rate in getting them to $0.

whoIsItFor.heading: Coverage for Every Business
whoIsItFor.card1Body: Finding the right plan for a small team can be overwhelming. We simplify the process and find options that fit your budget.
whoIsItFor.card2Body: As your team grows, so do your benefits needs. We help you scale your coverage without sacrificing quality or breaking the bank.
whoIsItFor.card3Body: Managing benefits for a team that spans multiple generations? We coordinate group plans with Medicare-eligible employees seamlessly.

howItWorks.heading: A Free Review in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.step1Description: Fill out the short form below. No commitment, no pressure — just information.
howItWorks.step2Description: Robert reviews your current coverage and pulls quotes from multiple carriers to find you real savings.
howItWorks.step3Description: We walk you through what we found. You decide if and when you want to switch. Simple as that.

testimonials.heading: Real Businesses. Real Results.
testimonials.t1Quote: I was spending a fortune on group coverage for my 12 employees. Robert found us a level-funded plan that saved us over $2,000 a month. Same great coverage.
testimonials.t2Quote: As a growing startup, I needed benefits that would help me attract talent without killing our runway. Robert set us up with a plan that works for everyone.
testimonials.t3Quote: Managing benefits for 30+ guys in the field was a nightmare. New Horizons simplified everything and actually saved us money in the process.

leadForm.successMessage: Robert will reach out within 1 business day with your personalized coverage options.
